project.name: GlucoSense
project.description: Smart diabetes management Android app for Indian Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus patients. Features AI-powered nutrition chat, glucose tracking, medication reminders, HbA1c trend prediction, hospital visit scheduling, vitals monitoring, and health report export.

build.requiredJava: Android Studio bundled JBR (OpenJDK 21) at C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr
build.buildCommand: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr && gradlew.bat assembleDebug

layers.network: Retrofit2 + Gson for Claude AI API calls

architecture.di: Manual constructor injection via ViewModelFactory classes

claudeApi.fallback: Rule-based South Indian diet advice (works without API key)

glucose_readings.computedProperty: status → GlucoseStatus enum: LOW (<70), NORMAL (70-140), HIGH (141-200), VERY_HIGH (>200)

columns.foodCategory: String: RICE_BASED | WHEAT_BASED | FRIED | FRUITS | VEGETABLES | PULSES | DAIRY | MIXED

hba1c_records.computedProperty: status → HbA1cStatus: NORMAL (<5.7), PREDIABETES (5.7-6.4), CONTROLLED (6.5-7.9), UNCONTROLLED (≥8.0)

columns.visitType: String: CLINIC | LAB_TEST | EYE_CHECK | FOOT_CHECK | OTHER

vitals_records.computedProperty: bpStatus → BPStatus: NORMAL (<120/80), ELEVATED (120-129/<80), HIGH_STAGE1 (130-139/80-89), HIGH_STAGE2 (≥140/≥90)

keys.logged_in: Boolean — whether user has completed login
keys.profile_complete: Boolean — whether profile setup is done
keys.password: String — simple 4-digit PIN (not secure, for demo only)
keys.name: String — patient's full name
keys.low_threshold: Int — glucose low alert threshold (default 70 mg/dL)
keys.high_threshold: Int — glucose high alert threshold (default 180 mg/dL)
keys.reminders_set: Boolean — whether WorkManager reminders have been scheduled

OtpActivity.flow: Enter 6-digit OTP → if profile incomplete go to ProfileSetupActivity, else go to MainActivity

MainActivity.attachBaseContext: Applies locale (en/kn) from SharedPreferences on every Activity recreate

DashboardFragment.purpose: Home screen — live summary of all key health metrics

dataDisplayed.glucoseCard: Latest glucose value (mg/dL), status badge (Low/Normal/High/Very High), timestamp, HbA1c value, Log button
dataDisplayed.statsRow: Meds taken today (X/Y), Medication adherence % (7-day), Next hospital visit date
dataDisplayed.aiSuggestion: Rule-based 1-line advice based on latest glucose status
dataDisplayed.featureTiles: 8 tiles: Blood Glucose, HbA1c, Medication, Nutrition, Vitals, Hospital Visits, Reports, About Me

DashboardFragment.reactivity: All values update automatically via Room LiveData. onResume() triggers adherence refresh.

GlucoseFragment.purpose: Log and view blood glucose readings with trend chart

features.chart: MPAndroidChart LineChart with fill area, Low (70) and High (180) limit lines, cubic bezier curve
features.tabs: 7 Days / 30 Days toggle for chart and stats
features.stats: Readings count, Average glucose, Out-of-range count

addDialog.readingType: Chip selection: Fasting / Post Meal / Bedtime / Random
addDialog.dateTimePicker: MaterialButton → DatePickerDialog → TimePickerDialog chain. Default is current time. Max date = today.

features.list: RecyclerView of all readings ordered by timestamp DESC

MedicationFragment.purpose: Manage medications and log daily dose compliance

addMedicationDialog.name: TextInputEditText — medication name (required)
addMedicationDialog.frequency: ChipGroup (single select): OD (×1) | BD (×2) | TID (×3) | QID (×4)
addMedicationDialog.mealTiming: ChipGroup (single select): Before Meal | After Meal | With Meal

reminderTimes.customization: Each time row has MaterialButton that opens TimePickerDialog

addMedicationDialog.saving: dose field stored as '500mg · Before Meal', reminderTimes as '08:00,14:00,20:00'

MedicationFragment.list: RecyclerView with MedicationAdapter — each item has Mark Taken / Mark Missed toggle buttons
MedicationFragment.adherence: Calculated as (taken_logs / total_expected) * 100 over past 7 days

NutritionFragment.purpose: AI-powered nutrition chat assistant for South Indian T2DM diet guidance

components.header: Blue gradient header with 'GlucoSense AI' title and subtitle
components.quickChips: Horizontal scrollable chips: 🌅 Breakfast ideas | 🍚 Is rice okay? | 🥨 Healthy snacks | 🍬 Glucose spike foods | 📋 Log today's meal
components.typingIndicator: ProgressBar + 'GlucoSense AI is thinking…' (shown during API call)

chatBubbles.user: Blue bubble (#1565C0), aligned right, top-left corner is sharp
chatBubbles.ai: Light grey bubble (#F5F5F5) with border, aligned left with avatar icon, top-right corner is sharp

aiIntegration.primaryPath: Calls Claude claude-haiku-4-5 via Retrofit. System prompt specializes it for Indian T2DM + South Indian foods. max_tokens=200.
aiIntegration.fallbackPath: if CLAUDE_API_KEY is blank OR network fails → rule-based responses for 9 categories

NutritionFragment.welcomeMessage: Auto-shown on screen open listing capabilities

quickChipActions.Breakfast ideas: Sends preset question about T2DM breakfast
quickChipActions.Is rice okay?: Sends preset question about rice for diabetics
quickChipActions.Healthy snacks: Sends preset question about low-GI snacks
quickChipActions.Glucose spike foods: Sends preset question about high-GI foods to avoid
quickChipActions.Log today's meal: AI explains how to describe meals in chat for assessment

HbA1cFragment.purpose: Track HbA1c (glycated haemoglobin) with trend chart and 3-month AI projection

features.latestCard: Shows latest HbA1c value, status text, date. Color-coded by status.

trendChart.actualData: Solid orange line with filled area
trendChart.projectedData: Dashed grey line extending one point beyond last reading
trendChart.limitLines: Green dashed at 7.0% (target), Red dashed at 8.0% (uncontrolled threshold)

predictionCard.algorithm: Simple linear regression on last 3 readings
predictionCard.output: Projected 3-month HbA1c value, status category, trend direction (↑/↓/stable), clinical advice text

features.targetRangesCard: Always visible reference: Normal <5.7%, Pre-diabetes 5.7-6.4%, Controlled 6.5-7.9%, Uncontrolled ≥8.0%

HospitalVisitsFragment.purpose: Schedule and track upcoming hospital/clinic appointments

features.nextVisitBanner: Shows nearest upcoming (not completed) visit at top

addDialog.visitType: Dropdown: Clinic | Lab Test | Eye Check | Foot Check | Other

features.list: RecyclerView with HospitalVisitsAdapter. Completed visits shown with strikethrough.
features.actions: Mark Complete (checkmark) | Delete (trash icon) per item

VitalsFragment.purpose: Log and view vitals: blood pressure, heart rate, SpO2, respiratory rate

ReportsFragment.purpose: Generate and share health summary reports

features.generateReport: Button → generates .txt file with glucose summary, medication logs, meal logs, HbA1c records
features.exportCsv: Button → generates .csv file with glucose readings and medication compliance
features.sharing: Intent.ACTION_SEND with FileProvider URI — opens system share sheet
features.mimeType: text/plain for report, text/csv for CSV

AboutMeFragment.purpose: User profile, language selection, reminder settings, developer info

sections.profileHeader: Blue gradient header with avatar circle and patient name
sections.personalInfo: Name (required), Age, Year of diagnosis, Doctor name, Diabetes type (chips: Type1/Type2/Gestational/Pre-diabetes)
sections.saveProfile: Saves name to SharedPreferences. If language changed, calls requireActivity().recreate() to apply new locale.
sections.reminders: Toggle for Glucose Check Reminders, Toggle for Medication Reminders, Test Reminder Now button
sections.language: ChipGroup: English | ಕನ್ನಡ (Kannada). Selecting and saving triggers full Activity recreate.
sections.signOut: Clears all SharedPreferences and finishes MainActivity

developerCard.designation: Assistant Professor, Division of Public Health, Department of Allied Health Sciences, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences, Bengaluru, India

implementation.applicationLevel: DiabeticCareApp.attachBaseContext() reads 'language' from SharedPreferences and calls applyLocale()
implementation.activityLevel: MainActivity.attachBaseContext() does the same — ensures correct locale after Activity recreate()
implementation.applyLocaleMethod: Uses LocaleList (API 24+) or deprecated config.locale (API < 24). Calls context.createConfigurationContext(config).
implementation.switching: User selects language in AboutMeFragment → saved to prefs → requireActivity().recreate() → app reloads in new language
implementation.notifications: NotificationHelper.localizedContext() reads language pref and wraps applicationContext before calling getString() — ensures notifications appear in user's selected language

localization.localizableStrings: 54 strings localized in Kannada including all navigation labels, meal types, medication terms, glucose status, greeting messages, AI labels, developer info, and notification text

channel_reminders.purpose: Medication dose reminders + glucose check reminders

types.glucoseReminder: Shown at scheduled times via WorkManager: 'Time to check your blood glucose!'
types.medicationReminder: Shown at each dose time: 'Time to take [MedName]'
types.glucoseAlert: Shown when glucose reading is entered at LOW or VERY_HIGH level

scheduling.bootRestart: BootReceiver re-schedules reminders after device reboot
scheduling.alarmReceiver: AlarmReceiver handles alarm intents for precise timing

claudeApi.systemPrompt: You are GlucoSense AI, a diabetes care assistant specializing in Indian T2DM patients. Give concise, practical advice about South Indian diet, glucose management, and diabetes care. Keep responses under 3 sentences. Use specific South Indian food names. Always be encouraging and medically responsible.
claudeApi.fallback: getRuleBasedResponse() in NutritionFragment — covers 9 query categories with South-Indian-specific advice

app/src/main/java/com/diabeticcare/app/.DiabeticCareApp.kt: Application class — locale setup, notification channels
app/src/main/java/com/diabeticcare/app/.MainActivity.kt: Single activity — NavHostFragment, bottom nav, locale, permissions

data/model/.ChatMessage.kt: Non-Room data class for nutrition AI chat UI state

data/database/.dao/GlucoseDao.kt: getAllReadings (LiveData), getLatestReading (suspend), getLatestReadingLive (LiveData), getReadingsSince, getAverageValueSince, getOutOfRangeCountSince, getReadingsSinceSnapshot
data/database/.dao/HospitalVisitDao.kt: getAllVisits (LiveData), getNextUpcomingLive (LiveData — first incomplete visit by scheduledDate ASC), insert, delete, markComplete

data/repository/.GlucoseRepository.kt: allReadings, latestLive, readingsSince(), insert(), delete(), getLatest(), averageLast(), outOfRangeCountLast(), snapshotLast()
data/repository/.MealRepository.kt: allMeals, insert(), delete(), getLatest(), mealCountLast(), snapshotLast()

network/.ClaudeModels.kt: ClaudeRequest, ClaudeMessage, ClaudeResponse, ClaudeContent data classes

utils/.PreferenceManager.kt: SharedPreferences wrapper — isLoggedIn, name, language, thresholds, reminders
utils/.NotificationHelper.kt: Creates channels, shows glucose/medication reminders, applies locale before getString()
utils/.ReminderScheduler.kt: Schedules WorkManager periodic tasks for reminders
utils/.ReminderWorker.kt: WorkManager Worker — triggers notification at reminder time

layout/.fragment_dashboard.xml: Home screen with header + glucose card + stats row + 8 feature tiles
layout/.fragment_glucose.xml: Glucose history with LineChart + stats + RecyclerView + FAB
layout/.fragment_nutrition.xml: AI chat interface with header + chips + RecyclerView + input bar
layout/.fragment_hba1c.xml: HbA1c with latest card + LineChart + prediction card + target ranges + history
layout/.fragment_hospital_visits.xml: Visit list with next visit banner + RecyclerView + FAB
layout/.fragment_reports.xml: Report period selector + adherence stats + export buttons
layout/.dialog_add_glucose.xml: Reading type chips + value input + date/time picker button + notes
layout/.dialog_add_medication.xml: Name + dose + frequency chips + meal timing chips + 1-4 time rows
layout/.dialog_add_visit.xml: Visit type + doctor + hospital + date picker + notes
layout/.item_medication.xml: Medication list row with name, dose, time, Taken/Missed buttons
layout/.item_meal.xml: Meal history row with emoji + type + portion + category + timestamp + delete
layout/.item_hba1c.xml: HbA1c history row with value badge + status + date + delete
layout/.item_hospital_visit.xml: Visit row with icon + type + doctor + date + complete/delete buttons
layout/.item_chat_user.xml: Blue right-aligned chat bubble for user messages
layout/.item_chat_ai.xml: Grey left-aligned chat bubble with AI avatar icon

drawable/.bg_header.xml: Blue-to-dark-blue gradient rectangle (used for all screen headers)
drawable/.bg_status_badge.xml: Rounded rectangle for glucose status badge
drawable/.bg_header_icon_btn.xml: Circle background for icon buttons in header
drawable/.bg_chat_user.xml: Blue pill shape — sharp top-right corner for user chat bubble
drawable/.bg_chat_ai.xml: Light grey pill shape — sharp top-left corner for AI chat bubble
drawable/.ic_launcher_foreground.xml: Blood drop shape with ECG waveform inside
drawable/.ic_launcher_background.xml: Blue-to-teal gradient for launcher icon background
drawable/.ic_ai_suggestion.xml: Lightning bolt vector for AI features

mipmap-anydpi-v26/.ic_launcher_round.xml: Same adaptive icon for round launcher

app/src/main/res/.navigation/nav_graph.xml: Single nav graph — DashboardFragment as start destination, 8 child destinations, 8 actions from dashboard
app/src/main/res/.values/strings.xml: 131 English strings covering all UI text, labels, notifications
app/src/main/res/.values-kn/strings.xml: 56 Kannada strings for all key UI elements
app/src/main/res/.xml/file_paths.xml: FileProvider path config for report sharing

appIcon.design: Blood drop shape containing an ECG/heartbeat waveline
appIcon.foreground: White blood drop + white ECG line
appIcon.format: Adaptive icon (API 26+) — ic_launcher.xml + ic_launcher_round.xml in mipmap-anydpi-v26
appIcon.note: No fallback PNG mipmap resources — works on API 26+ devices. For API 24-25 support, add PNG mipmaps.

permissions.INTERNET: Required for Claude AI API calls
permissions.CAMERA: For future face-scan vitals feature (not fully implemented)
permissions.POST_NOTIFICATIONS: For medication and glucose reminders (Android 13+, requested at runtime)
permissions.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED: To reschedule reminders after device reboot

providers.FileProvider: authority=${applicationId}.fileprovider, exported=false, grantUriPermissions=true, paths from res/xml/file_paths.xml

knownLimitations.faceScanVitals: Camera permission declared but face-scan feature is not implemented. Button exists in VitalsFragment but is non-functional.
knownLimitations.otpVerification: Simulated — any 6-digit code is accepted. No real SMS gateway integrated.
knownLimitations.pdfGeneration: iTextPDF dependency included but reports are saved as .txt and .csv (not true PDF). The 'Generate PDF' button produces a text report.
knownLimitations.apiKeyRequired: Claude AI only works if CLAUDE_API_KEY is added to local.properties. Without it, rule-based fallback is used.
knownLimitations.noPngMipmaps: Adaptive icon only works on API 26+. API 24-25 devices will show default Android icon.
knownLimitations.medicationReminders: ReminderScheduler and WorkManager wiring exists but exact per-medication time scheduling from reminderTimes string is not fully verified end-to-end.
knownLimitations.dataBackup: No cloud sync. All data is local SQLite only. Uninstall destroys all data.
knownLimitations.securityNote: EncryptedSharedPreferences dependency included but PreferenceManager uses plain SharedPreferences — no actual encryption applied.

setupInstructions.step2: Open in Android Studio (latest stable recommended)
setupInstructions.step3: Sync Gradle — it will download all dependencies automatically
setupInstructions.step4_optional: Add Claude API key to local.properties: CLAUDE_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-YOUR_KEY
setupInstructions.step6_cli: If building via CLI: set JAVA_HOME to Android Studio's JBR at C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr, then run gradlew.bat assembleDebug
